visual_rule: Fading electric residue with small motes, soft arcs, and a compact lingering center.
prompt: Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style lightning attacks. Show only the effect element, with no character, arena, text, UI, watermark, or frame. Use a fading spark residue made of small electric motes, soft arcs, and a few lingering bright fragments around a compact center. Keep contrast lower than the impact bloom but still crisp enough to read in battle. Preserve real electric energy structure but stylize the outline and color. Output a single isolated effect element on transparency.
